nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Transform this video game character into a photorealistic live-action young fantasy male. Keep the blonde hair, blue-green eyes, pointed ears, green tunic, green hat, blue scarf, and determined facial expression. Apply the photorealistic beautiful skin texture, natural lighting, fabric weathering, and cinematic forest atmosphere from the reference image. Maintain the same face angle and composition. Real camera photography, shallow depth of field, golden hour light.
